headline: Stop the gain today, reset your trajectory now
summary: You're gaining 0.18 kg/week when you need to lose 0.69 kg/week; today's discipline sets up a defensible weekend.
details: Eat only portioned Huel and whole foods today—no snacking, no extras—because Friday morning starts your highest-risk period. Hit 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill today to create a caloric buffer before the weekend temptations hit. TODAY matters because every pound you lose this week puts you 1.87 kg closer to 88 kg; every pound you gain is 1.87 kg further away. You cannot afford another week of +0.1 kg.
